summary: Phase 5 testing completed for ERP System CV. Dewi Aditya. All backend APIs and frontend modules are working correctly. Features tested: (5A) Master Kategori EEM with CRUD and seed-default, (5B) Procurement Request Types with 8 types, (5C) GL Mapping seed-default, (5D) UI modules for Master Kategori Expense and GL Mapping in Finance Portal.

fixed_bugs.issue: log_activity() function call had incorrect parameters (7 args instead of 4-5)
fixed_bugs.fix: Updated log_activity calls in employee_expense_category_master.py to use correct signature

navigation_notes.note: Module is accessible via direct URL navigation. Menu item 'Master Kategori Expense' is in Finance Portal sidebar under 'Master & Jurnal' section but requires scrolling to find.

passed_tests: POST /api/hr/expenses/master-categories - creates new category with name, code, description, is_active
GET /api/procurement/request-types - returns 8 procurement types (asset, consumable, service, subscription, maintenance, rental, project, other)
POST /api/hr/expenses/gl-mappings/seed-default - creates default GL mappings for all categories
Finance Portal navigation - Portal Keuangan accessible after login
Master Kategori Expense module - displays list of 15 categories with Seed Default and Tambah Kategori buttons
Add Category Form - all fields present (name, code, description, active status toggle)
GL Mapping Configuration module - displays 15 mappings with Seed Default Mapping and Tambah Mapping buttons
Procurement Request Module - Buat PR form shows dropdown with all 8 procurement types including 'Langganan / SaaS' and 'Kontrak Maintenance'
